data.description: HandyBuddy connects you with certified local experts for professional home improvement services nationwide — from furniture assembly to TV mounting. Get instant quotes and flexible scheduling.

CERTIFIED EXPERTS
★★★★★
4.87/5

Professional Assembly & Installation Services

Expert assembly for furniture, fitness equipment, outdoor structures, playsets, sheds, gazebos, and more. Our certified professionals handle everything from unboxing to final setup—including IKEA, Wayfair, Costco, Amazon purchases. No confusing instructions, no missing hardware, no stress.

Get a Free Quote
Flexible scheduling · No call required
Vetted Pros
100% Satisfaction
128,832+ Jobs
Certified Experts ✓

    ?
    NEED HELP?

    Can’t find what you’re looking for?

    Find answers to common questions about booking, service scope, pricing, and order updates in the HandyBuddy Help Center.

    Visit Help Center

    What's Included

    Preparation & What to Expect

    FAQs

    ✓ Professional installation and assembly for furniture, fitness equipment, sheds, play equipment and outdoor shade structures and more!
    ✓ Proper alignment, leveling, mounting, and secure fastening of all components
    ✓ Installation completed according to manufacturer specifications and safety guidelines
    ✓ Disposal of packaging materials in on-site bins and final readiness check before completion

    HandyBuddy makes installation easy from start to finish. A little preparation helps ensure your service goes smoothly and efficiently.

    • Clear the installation area so your expert can work safely and efficiently
    • Ensure all items are on-site and accessible on the day of service
    • Confirm power outlets or wall space availability if required for your installation
    • Discuss placement preferences or questions with your expert upon arrival
    • Your certified local installer arrives with professional tools and experience
    What types of installation services does HandyBuddy offer?

    HandyBuddy provides installation and assembly services for furniture, fitness equipment, most types of outdoor products and more.

    Are all HandyBuddy experts vetted and experienced?

    Yes. All HandyBuddy experts are vetted and insured professionals with hands-on assembly & installation experience.

    Do installers bring their own tools?

    Yes. Your expert arrives fully equipped with professional tools needed to complete your installation.

    How much do installation services cost?

    Pricing varies by service and item type. HandyBuddy provides instant online quotes so you can see your price upfront before booking.

    Can I choose a specific date and time?

    Yes. You can select your preferred date during the booking process.

    What happens if I have multiple items to install?

    You can book multiple services or items in a single appointment for added convenience.
